title: Contact — Darren Jones MP
headings: h2: Subscribe to my mailing list
text_excerpt: Contact — Darren Jones MP 0 Skip to Content Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Darren Jones MP Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Open Menu Close Menu Ask for help Policy questions For schools Events About me About Bristol North West Contact Subscribe to mailing list > Write to Darren Darren Jones MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Always include your full address when writing to Darren. Please be advised that contacting Darren via email is highly recommended, wherever possible. Mail handling and security checks in the House of Commons can cause substantial delays for letters sent via post to reach Darren. E-mail or call Darren's office Email darren.jones.mp@parliament.uk Please always include your full address in email correspondence. Phone numbers Constituency office: 0117 959 6545 Parliamentary office: 0207 219 5225 Please note the Parliamentary office will not be able to assist with personal issues (casework). If you leave a message on our voicemail, please leave your full name and telephone number. Please note, when a member of Darren’s team returns your call, the phone number will appear as a withheld private number on caller ID. Request a visit from Darren Darren visits schools, resident groups, hospitals, community meetings and local events. These normally happen on a Friday or a Saturday. Please email darren.jones.mp@parliament.uk to request a visit or call my office on 0117 959 6545. Surgery calls are limited and therefore prioritised for constituents who are receiving casework support to resolve individual problems. Please note, Darren is required to manage conflicts of interest between his role as a constituency MP and a minister. That means that businesses or other organisations seeking to lobby Darren about government policy or funding, whether directly or indirectly via constituents, must be referred to the Cabinet Office . Subscribe to my mailing list Please enter your email address in the box below to receive my monthly newsletter and announcements about my constituency events. We respect your privacy and you can unsubscribe at any time. You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here . Email Address Sign Up Thank you! Darren Jones MP, House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA darren.jones.mp@parliament.uk | 0117 959 6545 Website made with Squarespace . Read the Privacy Policy . This website has been designed to be accessible but there’s always more we can do to improve. Please contact us if you have feedback on accessibility and inclusivity.
